# Remove cloud-product and services claims from public identity

## Context

A live public-surface audit on 2026-07-12 found that Neo's identity pages conflate shipped deployment engineering with a public product and still advertise commercial offers that are not current project surfaces.

Verified examples:

- `README.md` says v13 “becomes a multi-tenant cloud deployment” that readers can point at their repositories, and says “one Brain, many tenants.”
- `learn/benefits/Introduction.md` repeats the multi-tenant cloud-service product claim inside an otherwise strong long-form introduction.
- `apps/portal/view/services/Container.mjs` advertises 40-hour Professional Trainings, Professional Services, and two email inboxes.
- `apps/portal/resources/data/seo.json` describes `/services` as professional services; `apps/portal/view/home/FooterContainer.mjs` exposes it as a primary door.
- Local product work has separate owners: local-first Agent OS onboarding is #14230; the Fleet service spine is #13015; the local cockpit is #14560. Discussion #14683 owns the still-open public product-page / proof architecture.

The immediate work is an accuracy correction, not a new business or product-page strategy.

## The Problem

Three realities are being collapsed:

1. Neo's current maintainer Agent OS runs locally against its own private graph and repository state.
2. Fleet Manager is the local control plane for the local orchestrator, graph, and harness fleet.
3. Neo contains real deployment engineering, but that does not make the repository a public hosted product or authorize a public services/training offer.

The current wording creates a false next step. A reader is promised a cloud product or paid help, while the truthful local product activation path and visual product pages are still being built. The website then routes interest to email instead of maintained community surfaces.

## The Architectural Reality

This is identity-class work governed by `neo-identity-update` and ADR 0018:

- **FRAMING:** public identity must distinguish implemented technical capability from available product.
- **ACTIONS:** every CTA needs a live, audience-appropriate door and proof adjacency.
- **Generated outputs:** update generators/sources, never hand-edit generated SEO output.
- **Cross-family review:** mandatory for an identity PR.

The long-form narrative in `learn/benefits/Introduction.md` remains a strong deep “why” surface. This ticket changes only the unsupported product-availability paragraph; it does not flatten or rewrite the guide.

The deployment guides and `ai/deploy/` are real engineering documentation. They remain in place. The correction is to stop projecting that capability as a currently available public product.

Structure-map check: `npm run --silent ai:structure-map -- --files --loc` completed on 2026-07-12. No `ai/` file placement change is prescribed. Portal changes stay in the existing `apps/portal/view/services/`, SEO-data, and footer siblings.

## The Fix

One bounded identity PR:

1. Correct `README.md` and the single product-availability passage in `learn/benefits/Introduction.md`:
   - describe the current Agent OS and Fleet Manager product boundary as local;
   - do not claim a public cloud product, shared maintainer graph, paid tier, pricing, customer offering, or one-command Agent OS activation before #14230 proves it;
   - preserve the technical deployment documentation as engineering capability.
2. Convert the existing Portal Services surface into a community-first **Connect** surface without introducing a new route/file topology:
   - remove all training/service offers, attendee/hour promises, and `mailto:` links;
   - label the visible page/footer door as Connect while retaining `/services` only as a temporary compatibility route;
   - update route SEO source text to match.
3. Route visitors to verified community doors. Discord was HTTP-verified live on 2026-07-12; Slack and LinkedIn are already present in the Portal but automation receives anti-bot responses, so their end-user liveness must be verified before they remain primary.
4. Keep actual Agent OS / Fleet Manager product pages, visual proof composition, and route information architecture in Discussion #14683. This ticket removes false claims now; it does not prematurely graduate that sandbox.

## Contract Ledger Matrix

| Target Surface | Source of Authority | Proposed Behavior | Fallback | Docs | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `README.md` Agent OS product section | ADR 0018 + local product owners #14230 / #13015 / #14560 | Distinguish current local operation from future product activation; no public cloud-product availability claim | If the clean-clone path is not proven, state that it is in progress and link the tracker rather than inventing a command | README | Exact-string guard + cross-family identity review |
| `learn/benefits/Introduction.md` product-availability passage | Existing Introduction narrative + ADR 0018 | Preserve the story and receipts; correct only the unsupported cloud-service projection | Keep the deep “why” page even when no product CTA is ready | Introduction | Focused diff + narrative review |
| `apps/portal/view/services/Container.mjs` | Portal CTA surface + operator community-door direction | Render community-first Connect content; no offers, durations, attendee counts, or email | Keep `/services` as a temporary compatibility route, visibly named Connect | Class JSDoc updated to current responsibility | Portal route render + text/link assertions |
| `apps/portal/resources/data/seo.json` + footer | Portal SEO/route sources | Present Connect and verified community actions, not Professional Services | Demote any unverified channel | SEO source + footer config | Metadata check + CTA liveness record |
| Future product pages | Discussion #14683 | Remain ungraduated until local product/proof shape converges | No new product page in this correction PR | Discussion body | No route/file fan-out in this ticket |

## Decision Record impact

`aligned-with ADR 0018`. No Agent OS, Fleet Manager, graph, tenant, or deployment architecture changes. This corrects public FRAMING and ACTIONS only.

Decision Record: Not needed.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `README.md` no longer presents the Agent OS as an available multi-tenant cloud product or says “one Brain, many tenants” as a public product promise.
- [ ] The corresponding passage in `learn/benefits/Introduction.md` is corrected without flattening the guide's narrative, receipts, or two-hemisphere identity.
- [ ] Technical deployment docs and `ai/deploy/` remain intact and are framed as engineering capability, not deleted to solve a positioning error.
- [ ] Portal visible content contains no Professional Trainings / Professional Services offer, training duration or attendee promise, `mailto:trainings@neomjs.com`, or `mailto:services@neomjs.com`.
- [ ] The existing Portal surface and footer read **Connect**; the compatibility `/services` route and SEO source no longer imply a commercial offering.
- [ ] Primary community CTAs have recorded end-user liveness evidence. Discord, Slack, and LinkedIn are preferred doors when verified; no email form or inbox is introduced.
- [ ] The PR follows the `neo-identity-update` ACTIONS checklist, including affected-surface inventory, proof adjacency, and generated-output discipline.
- [ ] Portal visual verification covers desktop and narrow viewport; focused route/content assertions cover the removed claims and CTA links.
- [ ] Cross-family review explicitly checks the local Agent OS / local Fleet Manager / deployment-capability separation.
- [ ] Product-page IA and visual composition remain in Discussion #14683; no static activity digest or product-page placeholder is smuggled into this accuracy PR.

## Out of Scope

- Building the Agent OS or Fleet Manager product pages.
- Creating a company, offer, pricing, lead-capture, training, consulting, or hosted-service language.
- Exposing maintainer Memory Core, Native Edge Graph, private messages, or any private deployment data.
- Changing local Agent OS, Fleet Manager, tenant, authentication, or deployment architecture.
- Claiming “one-line Agent OS” before #14230 proves a clean-clone journey.
- Replacing runtime Bird Views with Portal/static digests.

## Avoided Traps

- **Capability = product:** shipped deployment primitives do not prove a public product exists.
- **Delete real engineering to fix copy:** keep deployment code/docs; correct the projection layer.
- **Build product pages before the product proof converges:** Discussion #14683 remains the owner.
- **Replace email with another dead door:** community CTAs need liveness evidence.
- **Rewrite the good Introduction wholesale:** make the narrow truth correction and preserve its narrative strength.

Ideation owner for product-page architecture: Discussion #14683  
Identity authority: ADR 0018
